description_long: This is a tall, rectangular shelving unit constructed from light-colored wood, featuring five evenly spaced open shelves. The design is minimalist, with straight lines and no visible decorative elements, handles, or doors. The sides and back are solid panels, while the front and back are open, allowing for easy access to the shelves from either side. The wood grain is subtly visible, giving the unit a natural and slightly rustic appearance. The shelves are flat and sturdy, suitable for storing books, decorative items, or other objects. Its neutral color and simple form make it versatile for use in urban environments such as offices, garages, or public spaces.
description: A tall, light wood shelving unit with five open shelves and a minimalist, rectangular design. The shelves are accessible from both the front and back, with solid side panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing five open shelves and the full height of the shelving unit.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, flat side panel and the unit's depth.
description_view_2: Rear view, similar to the front, with open shelves visible and solid side panels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the solid side panel and depth.
